creator: olevole@olevole.ru
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #7)

Yes, most likely I will do the same as devel/subversion:

--
.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MSTATIC}
        @if ${GREP} -q ucol_close ${LOCALBASE}/lib/libsqlite3.a ; then \
                ${ECHO_MSG} "" ; \
                ${ECHO_MSG} "You can not build static subversion if your SQLite3 is built with ICU enabled."; \
                ${ECHO_MSG} "Please, reinstall 'devel/sqlite3' port with disabled ICU support."; \
                ${ECHO_MSG} "" ; \
                ${FALSE} ; \
        fi
.endif
--


On the other hand, I think it would be a good compromise to add an dialog option for CBSD port ( or FLAVOR ):

[x] Static

(by default). But those users who have an ICU can choose dynamic linking
